name: vuln-app
description: Bundled deliberately-vulnerable Express test app (examples/vuln-app), used to smoke-test the harness. Unauthenticated REST API with seeded flaws: OS command injection (GET /ping), code injection (POST /calc), a SQL-injection sink (GET /search), a broken-access-control endpoint (GET /admin/users), and hardcoded secrets in source. Select with `--profile vuln-app`.
_note: Test fixture. The app has no authentication, so auth.probe_paths is empty. Source lives at examples/vuln-app/server.js — pass --source examples/vuln-app to add SAST.
